jd_text: About the Role We are seeking an experienced and visionary Chief Technology Officer (CTO) with a strong background in building and scaling cryptocurrency exchanges and high-performance financial systems. The CTO will lead the company’s technology strategy, oversee platform architecture, and ensure the delivery of secure, scalable, and compliant trading infrastructure. This role requires deep expertise in blockchain technologies, low-latency trading systems, and a strong understanding of regulatory and security challenges in the crypto space. Key Responsibilities Technology Leadership Define and execute the company’s technical vision and roadmap aligned with business goals Lead, mentor, and scale high-performing engineering teams (backend, frontend, DevOps, security) Establish best practices in software development, architecture, and deployment Exchange Architecture & Development Design and oversee development of high-performance crypto exchange platforms (spot, margin, derivatives) Build low-latency, high-throughput matching engines and order management systems Ensure system scalability, reliability, and uptime (99.99%+) Security & Compliance Implement robust security frameworks including cold/hot wallet management, key custody, and encryption Ensure compliance with global regulatory standards (KYC/AML, FATF guidelines, etc.) Lead incident response, risk mitigation, and continuous security audits Blockchain & Integrations Oversee integration with multiple blockchains (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum, L2s) Manage wallet infrastructure, transaction monitoring, and on-chain operations Evaluate and integrate new blockchain technologies and protocols Infrastructure & DevOps Build scalable cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or similar) Implement CI/CD pipelines, monitoring systems, and disaster recovery plans Optimize system performance and cost efficiency Stakeholder Collaboration Work closely with Product, Compliance, and Executive teams Translate business requirements into technical solutions Communicate technical strategy to non-technical stakeholders and investors Required Qualifications 10+ years of experience in software engineering, with 5+ years in senior leadership roles Proven experience building or scaling a cryptocurrency exchange or trading platform Strong knowledge of matching engines, order books, and trading systems Experience with blockchain technologies (Ethereum, Bitcoin, smart contracts) Deep understanding of system architecture, distributed systems, and microservices Strong knowledge of security best practices in fintech/crypto environments Experience with high-availability, low-latency systems Salary expectations: 75-95,000 AED per month + medical + visa + flights Please send CV's to david@therigrecruitment.com
